top_signals.title: Buyer Flips London Mega Mansion for £56 Million Mark Up
top_signals.summary: The mystery buyer who acquired a mansion in London’s Regent’s Park at the end of 2024 has sold the property for about £195 million ($260 million) in one of the UK’s highest value sales of all time.
